title: Speck and Argentinian Empanadas
description: Flaky pastry pockets filled with savory speck and argentinian cheese, perfect as a snack or dessert.
instructions: Roll out the dense pastry dough to a thickness of about 1/8 inch.
Cut out circles of dough using a cookie cutter or the rim of a glass.
In a small bowl, mix together the speck, argentinian cheese, and garlicky butter.
Place a tablespoon of the speck mixture onto one half of each dough circle.
Fold the other half of the dough circle over the filling, pressing the edges to seal.
Use a fork to crimp the edges and create a decorative border.
Place the empanadas on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Brush the tops with a little water and bake for 20-25 minutes, or until golden brown.
